log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, tagged as a spreader with NSIS overlay and runtime modules. It's signed by a Chinese company. Now I need to get all IOC types to understand the full scope of available

I have a good overview. The sample is a spreader with network activity to 58bingboluo.com domains, registry persistence (though the count shows 0, the overview showed many registry keys set), and proc

The network activity shows clear C2 behavior. The malware contacts 58bingboluo.com domains for configuration (emnote.ini, file.json), crash reporting (tj_crashrecords.php), and file operations. It als

The registry changes tool returned empty results, but the initial overview showed many registry keys being set (Uninstall entries, FeatureControl, Proxy settings). This might be a limitation of the to
